pageDescription: Privacy policy of Sebastián Tamayo, in compliance with Law 1581 of 2012. Learn your rights and how we protect your information.
content:
# Privacy Policy

**Responsible Party:** Sebastián Tamayo  
**Website:** tasy.work  
**Contact email:** home@tasy.work  
**City:** Medellín, Colombia  
**Last updated:** June 2025

---

## 1. Purpose and legal framework

This Policy governs the processing of personal data collected through the website **tasy.work**, in compliance with **Law 1581 of 2012** (Personal Data Protection) and **Decree 1074 of 2015**, under the supervision of the Superintendence of Industry and Commerce (SIC).

## 2. Data collected

Through the site's forms, the following personal data is collected:

- Full name
- Email address
- Phone number
- Company and/or position

## 3. Purposes of processing

The collected data is used exclusively for:

1. **Handling contact and quote requests** for web development and digital consulting services.
2. **Commercial follow-up** and sending information about services, proposals, and relevant updates to the data subject, with prior authorization.

The data will not be used for purposes other than those stated here without the express authorization of the data subject.

## 4. Rights of the data subject

In accordance with Article 8 of Law 1581 of 2012, the data subject has the right to:

- **Know** what personal data is held in the database.
- **Update** their data when it is outdated or inaccurate.
- **Rectify** information that is erroneous.
- **Request proof** of the authorization granted.
- **Revoke** authorization and/or request deletion of their data, provided there is no legal or contractual obligation preventing it.
- **Access** their personal data free of charge.
- **File complaints** with the Superintendence of Industry and Commerce (sic.gov.co) for violations of data protection regulations.

## 5. Channel to exercise rights

To exercise any of the above rights, the data subject may send their request to:

**home@tasy.work**

The request must include: full name, ID number, and a clear description of the right being exercised. The response time is **ten (10) business days**, extendable by five (5) more days when the request cannot be addressed within the first term, informing the data subject of the reasons for the delay.

## 6. Transfer of data to third parties

Personal data may be transmitted to the following third-party platforms, which act as data processors under their own privacy policies:

- **Microsoft Clarity** (user behavior analysis) — [Microsoft Privacy Statement](https://privacy.microsoft.com/en-us/privacystatement)
- **Google Tag Manager** (tag management) — [Google Privacy Policy](https://policies.google.com/privacy)

No data will be transferred to other third parties without prior authorization from the data subject, except where required by law.

## 7. Security measures

Reasonable technical and organizational measures are adopted to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration, or improper disclosure.

## 8. Retention period

Personal data will be retained as long as necessary for the stated purposes or until the data subject requests its deletion, provided there is no legal obligation to retain it.

## 9. Modifications

This policy may be updated to reflect legal changes or changes in site practices. The current version will always be available at **tasy.work/en/privacy**.

---

*For any questions regarding this policy: **home@tasy.work***
